plugins.name: feature-creator
plugins.description: Feature development pipeline — GitHub issues to implementation plans to PRs.

plugins.name: security-scanner
plugins.description: Multi-tool security audit for Node.js web apps and Supabase projects — files findings as GitHub Issues with deduplication and auto-close.

plugins.name: docs-steward
plugins.description: Docs maintenance pipeline — builds canonical indexes of a repo, audits docs for drift, duplication, orphans, and onboarding gaps, then actively edits docs and opens a PR.
